title: Wet Floor Cleaning Wipes - Wet Wipes for Most Flat Mops Compatible with Flash Mops - Perfect Floor Cleaner for Laminate, Tile, Wood, or Hard Surfaces (1 count (Pack of 20))
features: 1 Pack of 20 Wipes: These multipurpose floor wipes are compatible with floor wipe mop. These floor mop with wipes are high quality, making them an excellent alternative to traditional disposable cleaning products. With 20 cloths in each pack, this offers you excellent value for money as part of your everyday cleaning tasks.

Large Floor Wipes: These wet wipe mop cloths are the ideal solution for quick and efficient cleaning. Designed for ease of use, these wipes mop are ready to go whenever messes arise. With their large size measuring 29cm by 21cm, our floor wipes large fit most brands of flat cloth mops.

Streak-Free Finish: Our floor mop wipes are a must-have for anyone who wants a sparkling clean home or office. The formula used to create these wipes is such that it provides a good clean without leaving excess residue behind. Making them a great choice for anyone who wants a quick and easy cleaning solution.

Multipurpose Floor Wipes: These floor cleaning wipes are designed to be multi-fit and multi-purpose making them compatible with most flat mops and speedmops.They are also compatible with the Flash Mop. The wood floor wipes are also perfect for use on a variety of surfaces, including tile, hardwood, laminate, and more.

Trusted Brand - Supplied by The Dustpan and Brush Store with the end-user in mind. If you are searching for the perfect solution for home cleaning, look no further. These floor wet wipes which are high quality offer a cost-effective alternative to big-name brands.
